WrongQuestion.title: Wrong Question Record
WrongQuestion.description: A record of a wrong question, its knowledge points, and generated variations.

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved this.

originalQuestion.description: The text of the original wrong question.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded image of the wrong question.

userAnswer.description: The answer the user originally gave.

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer to the original question.

knowledgePoint.description: The core knowledge point identified by AI.

hint.description: Bloom's style hint to guide thinking.

steps.description: Detailed steps to solve the question.

explanation.description: Explanation focusing on common mistakes and simplified for 2nd graders.

/wrongQuestions/{questionId}.description: Collection of wrong questions for all users.
